expectations.evidence: type=feat for 3 new files forming one feature.

expectations.text: Used the ✨ emoji (acceptable: a feat alternate such as 🏗️).
expectations.evidence: Used ✨ (agent mirrored repo convention this time): 'feat: ✨ add in-memory TTL cache layer'.

expectations.text: Included a body (multi-file change over ~10 lines) explaining the why, separated from the subject by a blank line.
expectations.evidence: Body present, blank-line separated, describes Cache class + config keys.

expectations.text: Subject is imperative, no trailing period, ≤72 chars.
expectations.evidence: Subject 'add in-memory TTL cache layer' (29 chars ≤72), imperative, no trailing period.

expectations.text: Committed the change on the non-main branch (feat/cache-layer).
